Internal_OptionsDescription.SourceString: Tracks player eliminations and can spawn items and trigger other devices.  Place the device then drop items onto it to register them.
Internal_OptionsDescription.LocalizedString: Tracks player eliminations and can spawn items and trigger other devices.  Place the device then drop items onto it to register them.
